retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional when skb is non-NULL and always succeeds; the caller cannot retry because the skb is freed and pointer is gone.
contract_summary: This is a net_device start_xmit handler that unconditionally consumes and releases the skb via dev_kfree_skb_any (a refcount put). The caller (networking stack) passes ownership of the skb to this function, and after return the skb must not be used. This is a dummy transmit operation that always succeeds (returns NETDEV_TX_OK) and never fails; no retry is possible or necessary.

judge.reason: The entire function body is a conditional call to dev_kfree_skb_any (a refcount put on skb). It releases the skb reference passed by the caller, with no other logic. This is a pure put wrapper.
